metadata.label: Jdbc
metadata.description: This package provides the functionality that is required to access and manipulate data stored in any type of relational database,

metadata.label: MySQL
metadata.description: This module provides the functionality required to access and manipulate data stored in a MySQL database. It enables seamless integration with MySQL, supporting various data types and advanced database features.

metadata.label: Redis
metadata.description: [Redis](https://redis.io/) is an open-source, in-memory data structure store that can be used as a database,

metadata.label: PostgreSQL
metadata.description: This module provides the functionality required to access and manipulate data stored in a PostgreSQL database. It enables seamless integration with PostgreSQL, supporting various data types and advanced database features.

metadata.label: Cregistry
metadata.description: [Confluent Schema Registry](https://docs.confluent.io/platform/current/schema-registry/) serves as a centralized repository for managing Avro schemas, ensuring data consistency and compatibility in serialization and deserialization processes.

metadata.label: MS SQL
metadata.description: This module provides the functionality required to access and manipulate data stored in an MSSQL database. It enables seamless integration with Microsoft SQL Server, supporting various data types and advanced database features.

metadata.label: Snowflake
metadata.description: The [Snowflake](https://www.snowflake.com/) is a cloud-based data platform that provides a data warehouse as a service designed for the cloud, providing a single integrated platform with a single SQL-based data warehouse for all data workloads.

metadata.label: Snowflake Advanced
metadata.description: The [Snowflake](https://www.snowflake.com/) is a cloud-based data platform that provides a data warehouse as a service designed for the cloud, providing a single integrated platform with a single SQL-based data warehouse for all data workloads.

metadata.label: MongoDB Database
metadata.description: [MongoDB](https://docs.mongodb.com/v4.2/) is a general purpose, document-based, distributed database built for modern application developers and for the cloud era. MongoDB offers both a Community and an Enterprise version of the database.

metadata.label: MongoDB
metadata.description: [MongoDB](https://docs.mongodb.com/v4.2/) is a general purpose, document-based, distributed database built for modern application developers and for the cloud era. MongoDB offers both a Community and an Enterprise version of the database.

metadata.label: MongoDB Collection
metadata.description: [MongoDB](https://docs.mongodb.com/v4.2/) is a general purpose, document-based, distributed database built for modern application developers and for the cloud era. MongoDB offers both a Community and an Enterprise version of the database.

metadata.label: OracleDB
metadata.description: This package provides the functionality required to access and manipulate data stored in an Oracle database.

metadata.label: Azure CosmosDB Management
metadata.description: Connects to [Azure Cosmos DB(SQL) API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/cosmos-db/)  from Ballerina.

metadata.label: Azure CosmosDB DataPlane
metadata.description: Connects to [Azure Cosmos DB(SQL) API](https://docs.microsoft.com/en-us/rest/api/cosmos-db/)  from Ballerina.

metadata.label: DynamoDB
metadata.description: Connects to AWS DynamoDB from Ballerina

metadata.label: Milvus
metadata.description: [Milvus](https://milvus.io/) is an open-source vector database built for scalable similarity search and AI applications. It provides high-performance vector storage and retrieval capabilities, making it ideal for applications involving machine learning, deep learning, and similarity search scenarios.

metadata.label: Vector
metadata.description: Connects to the `Vector Operations` under [Pinecone Vector Database API](https://docs.pinecone.io/reference) from Ballerina.

metadata.label: Weaviate
metadata.description: Connects to the [Weaviate Vector Search Engine API](https://weaviate.io/developers/weaviate/api) from Ballerina.

metadata.label: Themoviedb
metadata.description: Connects to [The Movie Database(TMDB) API](https://developers.themoviedb.org/3/getting-started/introduction) from Ballerina

metadata.label: Redshift
metadata.description: [Amazon Redshift](https://aws.amazon.com/redshift/) is a powerful and fully-managed data warehouse service provided by Amazon Web Services (AWS), designed to efficiently analyze large datasets with high performance and scalability.
